cards.name: Tom Bombadil
cards.description: A merry lord of the old woods, untouched by Haste or Fear . "In the greenwood, laughter is a shield more sure than iron."

cards.name: Fatty Bolger
cards.description: A stout watcher of the Shire, keen-eyed and steady-footed. "The quiet gate is often the first to know of danger."

cards.name: TreeParty
cards.description: Hobbits, humans, and dwarves in radius 5 gain Encouraged for 1 turn, and troll units are Halted . "There was laughter in the green, and the dark could not abide it."

cards.name: BagginsDontLeaveHere
cards.description: Hobbits within a personal radius of 2-4 hexes gain Hidden for 1 turn and lose Fear . "A small foot may slip where a dark thought would stumble."

cards.name: GoingOnAnAdventure
cards.description: Hobbits and Dwarves in radius 2 gain Encouraged. "A road once named calls the stout-hearted forth."

cards.name: MathomHouse
cards.description: From the old mathoms, you gain 1 1 1. "What was put by in peace may yet be found useful in need."

cards.name: Riddle
cards.description: Choose one character. Their refusal of duels ends, and you will win any duel forced on you this turn. "A true word may yet turn the sword-arm aside, and set the boldest heart to doubt."

cards.name: UnexpectedFireworks
cards.description: All Hobbits in radius 2 gain Hope for 1 turn, and all hexes in radius 3 are seen for 1 turn. "Bright sparks may unmask the wary and send the timid running."

cards.name: Shirriffs and Bounders
cards.description: All hexes of the Shire are seen for 1 turn. "A quiet watch keeps the lanes from forgetting themselves."

cards.name: BarrowWightWhisper
cards.description: Enemies in radius 2 gain Fear for 1 turn. "The dead whisper from the barrows, and the living grow pale at the sound."

cards.name: Muddy Lane
cards.description: The strongest enemy in your hex loses a total of 10 value in random resources, or gold if that is all they have, using caravan prices. "Even the mud may exact its due, till the purse and store are both made lighter."

cards.name: LanternsAtBreeGate
cards.description: Reveal all hexes in radius 3 as seen for 1 turn. "Lantern-light leaves little room for shadow."

cards.name: OldForestTurnabout
cards.description: If played in a forest, allied units in this hex gain Hidden and Haste for 1 turn. "The old ways know how to turn a path against the walker."

cards.name: RoomAtTheLastInn
cards.description: Heal all characters in your current hex by 15. "A warm room mends what the road has frayed."

cards.name: Road to Rivendell
cards.description: Hobbits and Dwarves in radius 2 gain Encouraged and Haste , and Fear and Halted are removed. "There are roads that remember the brave."

cards.name: The Prancing Pony
cards.description: Move up to 2 Hobbit, Dunedain, or Dwarf allies from adjacent hexes into your hex, and heal them 10. "A welcoming inn can gather the far-wandered home."

cards.name: The Greenway
cards.description: Allied Hobbit, Dunedain, and Dwarf units in radius 2 gain Haste for 2 turns. "Along the old road, quick feet and faithful hearts may yet outpace the shadow."

cards.name: Bree Rumours
cards.description: Reveal 5 random unrevealed hexes as unseen. "Five blind places are named by whisper, and the map remembers them."

cards.name: The Sack of Bag End
cards.description: The richest nearby enemy in radius 2 must yield 2 gold, or a resource in its stead. "When the halls stood empty, hungry hands came softly in the dusk."

cards.name: Barrow Chill
cards.description: Enemy units in radius 2 gain Frozen for 1 turn, and the weakest enemy is Blocked for 1 turn. "Cold graves send a quieter fear than any shout."

cards.name: Watch at Crickhollow
cards.description: Allied units in the hex reset their movement spent to 0 and gain Refusing Duelds for 1 turn. "While the doors are barred, the little folk may sleep; Fatty keeps the watch in the dark."

cards.name: Barrow Lilies
cards.description: Enemy units in radius 2 gain Despair (2). "White blooms at the barrow's edge carry a grief no plough can lift."

cards.name: Bombadil's Whim
cards.description: Reveal hidden enemy units in radius 2. If possible, the strongest enemy there is whisked to a hex at least 5 away from any PC or your own units. "When the merry fellow laughs, trouble may find itself elsewhere."

cards.name: Elven Lull
cards.description: Allied Hobbit and Elf units in radius 2 gain Haste for 1 turn. Nazgul units in radius 2 gain Blocked , and Orc and Troll units gain Halted for 1 turn. "Soft song and bright lament can still the dark and quicken the hidden road."

cards.name: River Lillies
cards.description: All units close to water in radius 5 are cleansed of negative status effects. "Where the river runs clear, even shadow loosens its grip."

cards.name: Old Man Willow Song
cards.description: Enemy units in forest hexes in radius 2 lose their remaining movement, and allied Hobbit units in those hexes gain Hidden for 1 turn. "The old wood hums, and the unwary forget the way."

cards.name: Climbing the White Hills
cards.description: If played on hills or mountains, reveal the surrounding area in radius 2, and allied Hobbit and Elf units gain Hope for 1 turn. "From high stones, the world opens and the heart remembers hope."

cards.name: Travel through the Marsh
cards.description: Enemy units in swamp or shallow water in radius 2 gain Poisoned and Halted , while allied Hobbit units there gain Hidden for 1 turn. "The mire keeps counsel with no one."

cards.name: Old Ruins of Arthedain
cards.description: Arthedain, Cardolan, and Rhudaur each reveal 2 hexes as seen for 1 turn. "Broken kings still leave a brightness in the stones."

cards.name: The Ford
cards.description: Enemy units in radius 2 that stand beside water are Halted for 1 turn. "A ford may be a road to one and a snare to another."

cards.name: Weathertop
cards.description: All units in the hill gain Strengthened and Fortified , but lose all movement and become Halted for 1 turn. "On the watch hill, the stone itself seems to command stillness."

cards.name: Floating in Barrels
cards.description: Allied Hobbit and Dwarf units on the sea in radius 5 move to the nearest land hex and gain Hidden for 1 turn. "When the river bears them onward, even a poor barrel may hide a quiet road."

cards.name: Butterflies
cards.description: Forest and swamp hexes in radius 3 are seen for 1 turn. "A wing in the dusk may lend the land a moment's truth."

cards.name: Travel in Safety
cards.description: Move all characters in this hex to your capital. "A road safest of all is the one that brings folk home at last."

cards.name: Bounders
cards.description: The Shire's bounders hold the road and bar the hedge against trespass. "A quiet watch is the first wall of the Shire."

cards.name: Hobbit Archers
cards.description: Hobbit archers loose their shafts from cover before the foe can close. "From the green hedges, a small bow may yet speak boldly."

cards.name: Hobbit Slingers
cards.description: Hobbit slingers darken the air with flying stones and quick hands. "The road will remember the sting of stones."

cards.name: Reclaimers Of Erebor
cards.description: Dwarven reclaimers press the mountain claim with iron resolve. "The stone remembers its own, and calls them home."

cards.name: Dwarven Explorers
cards.description: Dwarven scouts read the stone and find the hidden way. "By crack and shadow, the mountain gives up its secrets."

cards.name: Dragon Hunters
cards.description: Hunters of the great worms, hard-bitten and fire-tested. "When the sky burns, only the grim-willed stand close enough to answer."

cards.name: Bannerlords
cards.description: Bearers of the great standards, lifting the line with every stride. "Where a banner stands, many hearts stand with it."

cards.name: Elven Scouts
cards.description: Elven scouts move like a rumor through leaf and shade. "Silent feet and bright eyes are the forest's truest shield."
